nasb.text: In the same way then, there has also come to be at the present time a remnant according to God’s gracious choice.

esv.text: So too at the present time there is a remnant, chosen by grace.

cnv.text: 因此，現在也是這樣，按著恩典的揀選，還有剩下的餘數。

ccb.text: 现在的情况也是一样，上帝按照拣选的恩典留下了少数人。

csbs.text: 照样，在现今的时刻也有剩余的少数，就是藉着恩典蒙拣选的人。
